detail.description:
Ready to be a mukbang star? In Mukbang ASMR: Idol Livestream, you run your own cozy livestream channel. Cook amazing food, eat with satisfying ASMR sounds, and entertain your audience to earn big rewards.

What you’ll do:
- Shop & Cook: Buy ingredients and cook delicious dishes—from spicy noodles and seafood to sweet desserts. Make meals your viewers will love.

- Go Live & Enjoy ASMR: Start your livestream, eat on camera, chat with fans, and react to comments. Enjoy satisfying ASMR eating sound
